hooks.command: [ -f graphify-out/graph.json ] && [ -f wiki/graphify-out/graph.json ] && echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","additionalContext":"graphify: Read graphify-out/GRAPH_REPORT.md for raw corpus structure and wiki/graphify-out/GRAPH_REPORT.md for the curated wiki structure. After editing wiki/*.md, rerun powershell -File scripts/rebuild_wiki_graph.ps1."}}' || true
